reviews.review_description: I have a Q3 and Q3S and have been unable to get this app working on either headset over the past few weeks. It will launch and play an intro for 1 or 2 minutes. Abel gets to the point where he talks about "big corporations taking over" in the intro--it seems this is a transition point where a new scene is supposed to load, but the app just goes black and nothing occurs. No audio, no graphics, and oddly the app doesn't crash, it just goes dark & silent. I'm actually a pretty big fan of Abel and would love to experience this, but it seems broken probably due to a Meta update. I hope the devs see this review and respond regarding a fix. I'm happy to rate this properly if they get it resolved. Until then I can't recommend.
Probably my favorite of the missing pictures experiences. I dont know, I'm going to watch them again.
